blockedAssertions.blockedBy: GPU Python backends (CuDF/Torch) unavailable in current environment. The .venv_cuda exists but main venv lacks GPU dependencies. This is a known pre-existing issue documented in AGENTS.md. Historical benchmark data in bench_gpu_scale.json shows correctness parity for 3 patterns on RTX 4070.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: gpu-and-index-scaling' section covering GPU, Index, and Cross-area assertion testing approaches
